TNT Rod — Plugin Summary
A Paper 1.21.1 plugin adding a powerful single-use weapon disguised as a fishing rod.
Crafting: Combine 1 Fishing Rod + 1 TNT anywhere in a crafting grid. No specific pattern needed. You can also get one instantly with /tntrod if y
body:
TNT Rod — Plugin Summary
A Paper 1.21.1 plugin adding a single-use explosive fishing rod. Craft it with 1 Fishing Rod + 1 TNT (or use /tntrod as op).
Cast the rod, then right-click again to reel in — a lit TNT spawns at your crosshair up to 300 blocks away, 1 block above the surface, with a 1-second fuse. Rod is consumed on use.
